targets.query:
from(bucket: "dba")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oracle_sysmetric")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "metric_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == ${host:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == ${instance:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["metric_name"] == "Host_CPU_Utilization_(%)")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "dba")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oracle_sysmetric")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "metric_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == ${host:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == ${instance:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["metric_name"] == "Session_Limit_%")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "dba")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oracle_sysmetric")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "metric_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == ${host:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == ${instance:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["metric_name"] == "Process_Limit_%")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "dba")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oracle_tablespaces")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "free_space_mb" or r["_field"] == "max_size_mb" or r["_field"] == "percent_used" or r["_field"] == "used_space_mb")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == ${host:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == ${instance:doublequote})
  |> group(columns: ["host", "tbs_name", "_field"])  // 호스트와 tbs_name으로 그룹화
  |> last()  // 각 그룹에서 최신 데이터만 선택
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time", "tbs_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")  // _time을 rowKey로 사용, _field 값을 열 이름으로 사용
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "tbs_name", "free_space_mb", "max_size_mb", "percent_used", "used_space_mb"])  // 필요한 열만 선택
  |> rename(columns: {tbs_name: "_tablespace_name", percent_used:"percent_used_pct"})  // _time을 time으로, tbs_name을 tablespace_name으로 이름 변경
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
       time: r._time,
       tablespace_name: r._tablespace_name,
       used_space_mb: r.used_space_mb,
       free_space_mb: r.free_space_mb,
       max_size_mb: r.max_size_mb,
       percent_used_pct: r.percent_used_pct
  }))  // 컬럼 순서를 재배열하고 필요한 필드만 선택
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "dba")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oracle_wait_class")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wait_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == ${host:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == ${instance:doublequote})
  |> group(columns: ["wait_class"])  
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "dba")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oracle_wait_event")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "latency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == ${host:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == ${instance:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["wait_event"] == "db_file_sequential_read")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:" db file sequential read (ms)"}))
  |> yield(name: "mean")

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "latency")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == ${host:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["instance"] == ${instance:doublequote})
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["wait_event"] == "db_file_scattered_read")

  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:" db file scattered read (ms)"}))
  |> yield(name: "mean")

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/v1"
v1.tagValues(
  bucket: "dba",
  tag: "host",
  predicate: (r) => exists r.instance
)
list.label: 호스트명
list.name: host
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/v1"
v1.tagValues(
  bucket: "dba",
  tag: "host",
  predicate: (r) => exists r.instance
)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/v1"

v1.tagValues(
  bucket: "dba",
  tag: "instance",
  predicate: (r) => not exists r.sql_instance
)
list.label: 인스턴스명
list.name: instance
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/v1"

v1.tagValues(
  bucket: "dba",
  tag: "instance",
  predicate: (r) => not exists r.sql_instance
)
